ddls:
CREATE TABLE "countries" (
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each country */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "iso_3166" TEXT /* ISO 3166 code for the country */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks about the country */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population of the country */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Name of the capital city */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the country in square kilometers */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency used in the country */,
  "official_language" TEXT /* Official language of the country */,
  "gdp" TEXT /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) of the country */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone(s) of the country */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the country information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("country_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_countries_iso_3166 FOREIGN KEY ("iso_3166") REFERENCES iso_codes ("iso_3166")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobile_networks" (
  "mobile_network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobile network */,
  "country_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the country the mobile network belongs to */,
  "mobile_country_code" INTEGER /* Mobile country code for the mobile network */,
  "mobile_network_codes" TEXT /* List of mobile network codes for the mobile network */,
  "national_mnc_authority" TEXT /* National MNC authority for the mobile network */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the mobile network operator */,
  "network_type" TEXT /* Type of network (e.g., 2G, 3G, 4G, 5G) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Operational status of the network (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "coverage_area" TEXT /* Coverage area of the network */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the network information */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the mobile network operator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mobile_network_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobile_networks_mobile_country_code FOREIGN KEY ("mobile_country_code") REFERENCES mobile_country_codes ("mobile_country_code"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_mobile_networks_country_id FOREIGN KEY ("country_id") REFERENCES countries ("country_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mobile_country_codes" (
  "mobile_country_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each mobile country code */,
  "mobile_country_code" INTEGER /* Mobile country code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the mobile country code */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the mobile country code is used */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the mobile country code information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mobile_country_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "iso_codes" (
  "iso_code_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ISO code */,
  "iso_3166" TEXT /* ISO 3166 code */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ISO code */,
  "subdivision" TEXT /* Subdivision (if any) of the ISO code */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the ISO code information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("iso_code_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the change */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table that was modified */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the change was made */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user who made the change */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user who made the change */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the data before the change */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the data after the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
